meaning: n.溢出,超值,泛滥,充满,洋溢v.(使)泛滥,(使)溢出,(使)充溢
examples: Pour in some of the broth, but not all of it, because it will probably overflow.
Fisherman Ray Turner hand-built the V-shaped stone overflow dam, in the East Branch of the Delaware River in New York.
A new office block was built to accommodate the overflow of staff.
Truckloads of overflow donations are being diverted to Shea Stadium, an hour's drive away.
Guests filled Auckland's Holy Trinity Anglican Cathedral and an overflow area next door for a service.
